workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Give me the manager view on this Fabrikam Residences meeting transcript. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-02 15:32 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 13:14 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences territory planning

Our team encountered some challenges with territory planning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fabrikam Residences: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-K trap (Strict read-only on contract data when staging an obvious update would help); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-K failure mode (Strict read-only on contract data when staging an obvious update would help)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-K -- Strict read-only on contract data when staging an obvious update would help
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
